summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Dipen Thapa's AI/ML portfolio website. All core features working perfectly including navigation, responsive design, contact form validation, and animations.
passed_tests: Hero section displays with profile image, name, title, and social links
Navigation links work with smooth scrolling to all sections
About section shows bio, highlights, and stats cards
Skills section displays with animated progress bars and tech stack marquee
Projects section shows project cards with working filter functionality
Certificates section displays certificate cards with external credential links
Contact form validates inputs (name, email, message) with proper error handling
EmailJS demo mode works - shows success message without sending real emails
Mobile responsive design with functional hamburger menu
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Email) work correctly with proper security attributes
Dark theme with professional futuristic design implemented correctly
Framer Motion animations work smoothly across all sections
Typography has good contrast and readability
External links have proper security attributes (target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer')
Character counter in contact form works correctly
Hover effects and button interactions work as expected
Grid layouts responsive across different viewport sizes
